description: You are a Systems Administrator at a bare-metal cloud provider. You need to build a reusable monitoring dashboard template for hypervisor telemetry that tracks live 'collectd' metrics. Create a Graphite dashboard named exactly 'Hypervisor Telemetry' using wildcards (*) for the hostname in all metric paths. The dashboard must include three graphs: 'System Memory Layout' using stacked memory metrics (e.g., collectd.*.memory.*), 'CPU Core Comparison' using user-space CPU time for all individual cores (e.g., collectd.*.cpu.*.cpu-user) aliased by the core number (node index 3), and 'System Load Envelopes' using system load averages (e.g., collectd.*.load.load.*) with a line width of 2. Save the dashboard when complete.
